response.original_title: REIRIE: Amethyst (JAM at Kabukicho Tower Stage)
response.overview: The 2-member unit REIRIE consisting of Rei Kuromiya and Rie Kaneko makes its long-awaited major debut. This work released from the MoooD Records label within Bandai Namco Music Live is an ambitious work that draws out their expressive power and presence to the utmost limit and develops diverse sounds such as pop, electro, and ballads based on rock including the advance singles "BaD=DoLL" and "Aishiteyo" with edgy production by Yuki Tsujimura and MEGMETAL.  The limited REI edition comes with a Blu-ray that contains the free live "JAM" held on September 12 at Kabukicho Tower Stage.
response.title: REIRIE: Amethyst (JAM at Kabukicho Tower Stage)
